description: Mack finds future Yo-Yo captive in Kasius's arena. Kasius taunts Mack, then drinks Odium and murders future Yo-Yo in front of him. Simmons distracts Kasius by activating an implant she took from his servants, causing him severe pain. Mack seizes the opportunity and kills Kasius in a brutal fight, then grieves for Yo-Yo before being reunited with his own timeline's Elena.

transcript.line: Elena told me I'd find you here.
Yo-Yo. what'd they do to you?
I've gotten to know Elena quite well. Pain can be so persuasive.
I'm not leaving. I said let her go!
Look at her tremble. Perhaps she knows what comes next for you. For me? Huh? For all of us here, standing on the edge of timeless, violent glory.
Aah! Take the Orchard! Slaughter the rest!
I'm gonna beat your body with your own skull!
